note_text: Wound note - Rightlowerle. Meas 5.5x1.8x0.5cm. Heavy serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 37% gran, 63% slough. Periwound erythematous. Alginate dsg applied. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Ramirez notified.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right lower leg wound site, rates 7/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Venous venous Right lower leg measures 5.5 cm x 1.8 cm x 0.5 cm.
  Wound bed: 21% slough, 79% granulation tissue. Periwound: indurated.
  Drainage: heavy. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Venous venous Right lower leg — improving.
Plan: Debridement consult ordered. Negative pressure wound therapy initiated.
